keyword: how to check data balance vodacom ussd
pageTitle: How to check Vodacom data balance by USSD
metaDescription: Check your Vodacom data balance by USSD, confirm active bundles and airtime, and spot fallback charges before they drain your remaining balance today.
h1: How to check data balance Vodacom USSD
quickAnswer: To check Vodacom data balance, start with *135# from your Vodacom SIM and choose balances. If your line supports a quick summary, *136# may also help. Use the MyVodacom app when you need a fuller breakdown by bundle type.

causes.cause: Vodacom shows different bundle views in app and USSD
causes.explanation: Most users check only one screen, then think the bundle vanished when the latest Vodacom balance has not refreshed yet. Vodacom balance views often separate bundle categories, so users can miss the active one. Users usually notice it after a morning check or a recent top-up.

causes.cause: A recent top-up has not fully reflected
causes.explanation: A new recharge can take a moment to align across app, USSD, and account history.

causes.cause: The wrong bundle type is being checked
causes.explanation: Social, night, and anytime bundles can sit in different balance views.

vodacom: Dial *135# and choose the balance option.
Use *136# if your line supports a quick balance summary.
Open the MyVodacom app for a fuller bundle breakdown.
Check the right bundle type, such as anytime, night, promotional, or social data.
Refresh the account after any recent top-up or transfer.
Compare USSD with MyVodacom before assuming the bundle is gone.

preventionTips: Check balance before you load more airtime or buy another bundle.
Use the USSD route when the app is slow or data is weak.
Compare the balance view with recent usage if numbers look wrong.
If airtime starts dropping after data ends, check out-of-bundle settings and subscriptions.

faqs.question: How do I check my Vodacom data balance?
faqs.answer: Use *135# and choose balances, or use the MyVodacom app to view the latest balance. If one screen looks delayed, check both before buying more data.

faqs.question: Can I check Vodacom airtime and data in the same place?
faqs.answer: Yes. My Vodacom app usually shows both, while *135# gives a quick live menu on the line.

faqs.question: Why does my Vodacom balance look different in the morning?
faqs.answer: A recent top-up, rollover, or delayed refresh can make the first morning check look different from the previous night.
